payload.message: Multiplexed dev observability — this file is the only local sink.
Browser console sink active at .cursor/dev-unified.jsonl (channel runtime-console).
Vite cursor-debug sink ready (POST /api/cursor-debug → dev-unified.jsonl, channel cursor-debug)
Cursor debug sink active at .cursor/dev-unified.jsonl (channel cursor-debug).

payload.text: Game API ready. Use window.gameAPI in console. Namespaces: world, entities, components, tools, terrain, lighting, postProcessing, behavior, prefabs, undoRedo, query, content, navigation, debug

bootPhase=coldStart (large frames often expected during load/prewarm). rawDt >> frameMs: most wall time was between rAF ticks (other main-thread work, browser, or tab background) — not inside the timed engine-loop slices below. terrainInitialSurfaceBuild: common gaps — Vite dev mesh-worker connect + WASM init, sync mesh fallback, batched mesh apply, or (before voxelInit) full-world saveWorld RLE serialization to IndexedDB (now cooperative — see SAVE_WORLD_SERIALIZE_TIMING).
